name: Substance Use Disorder Inpatient Encounter Codes
description: HCPCS and UB revenue codes for substance use disorder (SUD) inpatient and residential treatment encounters. Used in initiation and engagement of substance use disorder treatment (IET) and follow-up after emergency department visit for substance use (FUA) measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Behavioral health; short-term residential (non-hospital residential treatment program), without room and board, per diem
Behavioral health; long-term residential (non-medical, non-acute care in a residential treatment program where stay is typically longer than 30 days), without room and board, per diem
Alcohol and/or drug abuse halfway house services, per diem
Alcohol and/or other drug treatment program, per diem
Alcohol and/or drug services; sub-acute detoxification (hospital inpatient)
Alcohol and/or drug services; acute detoxification (hospital inpatient)
Alcohol and/or drug services; sub-acute detoxification (residential addiction program inpatient)
Alcohol and/or drug services; acute detoxification (residential addiction program inpatient)
Alcohol and/or drug services; ambulatory detoxification
Behavioral health/substance abuse services — residential treatment
